notes: Up to 4 adult tickets at $5 each. Children under 18 always free (book as child tickets). Pass does not guarantee reservation; call 617-278-5156 if issues.
raw: This pass allows for booking up to four Adult tickets at $5 each. Children under 18 always get in free and should be booked as child tickets. This library pass does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum. If you have any issues reserving your tickets, you can call the Gardner Museum's Box Office at 617-278-5156. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
